mapper.select: SELECT payment_summary.total_count AS totalCount, payment_summary.success_count AS successCount, CONCAT(FORMAT(payment_summary.success_rate, 2), '%') AS successRate, CONCAT('¥', FORMAT(payment_summary.success_amount, 2)) AS successAmount, payment_summary.pending_payment_count AS pendingPaymentCount, COALESCE(refund_summary.failed_refund_count, 0) AS failedRefundCount, COALESCE(channel_summary.disabled_channel_count, 0) AS disabledChannelCount, ( CASE WHEN payment_summary.pending_payment_count > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN COALESCE(refund_summary.failed_refund_count, 0) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN COALESCE(channel_summary.disabled_channel_count, 0) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS alertCount FROM ( SELECT COUNT(1) AS total_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS success_count, CASE WHEN COUNT(1) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100 / COUNT(1) END AS success_rate, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'SUCCESS' THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS success_amount, SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('PREPAY_CREATED', 'WAIT_CALLBACK') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pending_payment_count FROM t_payment_order ) payment_summary CROSS JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(1) AS failed_refund_count FROM t_refund_order WHERE status = 'FAIL' ) refund_summary CROSS JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(1) AS disabled_channel_count FROM t_payment_channel_config WHERE status = 'DISABLED' ) channel_summary

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS statDate, COUNT(1) AS totalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS successCount, CONCAT('¥', FORMAT(COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'SUCCESS' THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0), 2)) AS successAmount FROM t_payment_order GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY statDate DESC LIMIT 7

SELECT channel_code AS channelCode, payment_method AS paymentMethod, COUNT(1) AS totalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS successCount, CONCAT( FORMAT( CASE WHEN COUNT(1) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100 / COUNT(1) END, 2 ), '%' ) AS successRate, CONCAT('¥', FORMAT(COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'SUCCESS' THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0), 2)) AS successAmount, SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('PREPAY_CREATED', 'WAIT_CALLBACK') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pendingCount, CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('PREPAY_CREATED', 'WAIT_CALLBACK') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN 'P1' WHEN ( CASE WHEN COUNT(1) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100 / COUNT(1) END ) < 80 THEN 'P2' ELSE '正常' END AS riskLevel, CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('PREPAY_CREATED', 'WAIT_CALLBACK') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN 'danger' WHEN ( CASE WHEN COUNT(1) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100 / COUNT(1) END ) < 80 THEN 'warn' ELSE 'success' END AS riskLevelType, CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('PREPAY_CREATED', 'WAIT_CALLBACK') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN '存在待收口支付单，建议优先查单并核对回调。' WHEN ( CASE WHEN COUNT(1) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100 / COUNT(1) END ) < 80 THEN '成功率偏低，建议检查路由命中、渠道稳定性和异常日志。' ELSE '当前渠道表现稳定，可持续观察。' END AS riskHint FROM t_payment_order GROUP BY channel_code, payment_method ORDER BY totalCount DESC, successCount DESC

SELECT 'WAIT_CALLBACK_TIMEOUT' AS alertType, '支付回调待收口' AS alertTitle, '仍有支付单处于待回调状态，需要主动查单或补回调。' AS alertMessage, 'P1' AS alertLevel, 'danger' AS alertLevelType, COUNT(1) AS affectedCount, '进入支付交易异常中心，优先核对待回调支付单、回调日志和查单结果。' AS suggestedAction, '/payment-issues?issueType=待回调未收口' AS actionRoute FROM t_payment_order WHERE status = 'WAIT_CALLBACK' HAVING COUNT(1) > 0
UNION ALL
SELECT 'REFUND_FAIL' AS alertType, '退款失败待重试' AS alertTitle, '退款单存在失败记录，需要运营复核后重试或切线下处理。' AS alertMessage, 'P1' AS alertLevel, 'danger' AS alertLevelType, COUNT(1) AS affectedCount, '进入退款单管理页，按失败状态过滤后复核重试。' AS suggestedAction, '/refunds?refundStatus=FAIL' AS actionRoute FROM t_refund_order WHERE status = 'FAIL' HAVING COUNT(1) > 0
UNION ALL
SELECT 'CHANNEL_DISABLED' AS alertType, '渠道已停用' AS alertTitle, '存在已停用渠道，请确认是否需要同步调整路由规则。' AS alertMessage, 'P2' AS alertLevel, 'warn' AS alertLevelType, COUNT(1) AS affectedCount, '进入支付渠道与路由页，检查停用渠道和对应路由规则。' AS suggestedAction, '/payment-config' AS actionRoute FROM t_payment_channel_config WHERE status = 'DISABLED' HAVING COUNT(1) > 0
